channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Otter’s new feature lets users search across their enterprise tools
item.description: Otter is also releasing a new Windows app that can capture meeting notes without joining one

item.title: The Hottest Anti-AI Gadget Is a Cyberdeck
item.description: On TikTok, young women are going viral for crafting whimsical homemade computers inside purses.

item.title: WIRED’s Smart Home Ecosystem Guide (2026)
item.description: If you’re waffling between Alexa, Siri, and Google, the answer may already be in your home.

item.title: India’s Snabbit closes $56M round as investor interest in on-demand home services heats up
item.description: Snabbit now processes over 40,000 daily jobs and has cut costs sharply as it expands across cities and services.
